change_request: Add Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages adapted from cohomegrant.com for Pivot Lending Group, wire footer links to those pages
acceptance_criteria: GET /en/privacy-policy renders Privacy Policy with Pivot Lending Group branding
GET /en/terms-conditions renders Terms and Conditions with Pivot Lending Group branding
Both pages include TCPA consent disclosure
Both pages include pending compliance review notice
ES routes display English content with bilingual language notice
Footer Privacy Policy and Terms labels are clickable Link elements
Footer disclosure text no longer says available upon request
Both new routes appear in sitemap.ts

scope.change_request: Add Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages adapted from cohomegrant.com for Pivot Lending Group, wire footer links to those pages

GET /en/terms-conditions renders Terms and Conditions with Pivot Lending Group branding

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by adding Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages with the required branding and disclosures.

risks: app/[lang]/privacy-policy/page.tsx:PrivacyPolicyPage - Incorrect language handling could lead to navigation errors.
app/[lang]/terms-conditions/page.tsx:TermsConditionsPage - Missing compliance notice could lead to legal issues.
components/layout/site-footer.tsx - Incorrect link wiring could break footer navigation.

llm_analysis.notes: The code handles invalid language inputs by redirecting to a not found page.
No breaking changes to existing APIs or contracts.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Add tests to ensure new pages render correctly and links in the footer are functional.

rollback.head: 8fc381ea0258917c4dce07d00cceb2cc4d1e2682
rollback_steps: 2. Resolve any merge conflicts if prompted
rollback.additional_cleanup: Review affected files for any required data/config cleanup

overall.summary: The changes fulfill the requirements by adding the necessary pages and linking them in the footer. However, testing should be added to ensure functionality.
key_concerns: Lack of test coverage for new pages and footer links.
